findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "get_intake_questions" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: The questions Pactlio asks to draft a specific contract type — use these to collect the information needed before calling start_contract_draft. Returns fields, …

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

name: get_draft_status
description: Check a contract draft started with start_contract_draft. While generating returns status "pending". When complete, returns the free preview (opening sections), the titles of locked sections, and the URL where a human can pay to unlock the full contract.

name: get_checkout_link
description: Returns the URL where a human can view the preview and pay to unlock the full contract for a draft created with start_contract_draft. Share this link with your user.

name: analyze_contract
description: Paste contract text and get an AI risk analysis: red flags, one-sided clauses, missing protections, and questions to ask. Free (2/day). Not legal advice.

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "get_intake_questions" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: The questions Pactlio asks to draft a specific contract type — use these to collect the information needed before calling start_contract_draft. Returns fields, …

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_draft_status, get_checkout_link · Private data: list_contract_types · Public sink: get_checkout_link.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_draft_status, get_checkout_link · Private data: list_contract_types · Public sink: get_checkout_link

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
